summary: Testing of new Marketing Landing Page feature at /join, /marketing, /promo routes. Comprehensive backend API testing (20 tests) and frontend E2E testing (22 tests) for multi-step registration flow with lead capture, plan selection, Razorpay payment integration, chat enquiry form, and contact buttons (WhatsApp, Call Now).
passed_tests: POST /api/marketing/lead - Create lead with all fields
POST /api/marketing/lead - Create lead with minimal fields
POST /api/marketing/lead - Duplicate mobile returns existing lead
POST /api/marketing/lead/{id}/step2 - Success with Razorpay order creation
Marketing lead appears in regular leads
Step 1 form displays all required fields
Step 1 form validates mobile number format
Step 1 successful submission advances to Step 2
Referral code from URL is pre-filled
Step 2 shows plan selection with prices
WhatsApp button is visible with correct link
Call Now button is visible with correct link
Navigation bar shows phone and WhatsApp
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing admin (mobile: 9999999999, password: admin123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Landing Page feature fully tested and working: 1) Multi-step registration flow at /join, /marketing, /promo routes. 2) Step 1 captures lead info (name, mobile, email, referral_code) via POST /api/marketing/lead. 3) Step 2 allows plan selection, creates Razorpay order via POST /api/marketing/lead/{id}/step2. 4) Step 3 completes registration after payment via POST /api/marketing/lead/{id}/complete. 5) Chat/enquiry form via POST /api/marketing/enquiry. 6) WhatsApp button (+91 7812901118), Call Now button, floating contact buttons all working. 7) Leads stored in marketing_leads and regular leads collections. 8) Admin can view marketing leads via GET /api/marketing/leads and enquiries via GET /api/enquiries.

notes.razorpay_integration: Real Razorpay test mode - creates actual order_xxx IDs in step 2
notes.referral_tracking: Referral code can be passed via ?ref=CODE URL parameter or entered manually
